channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Lineage Piece Codes (June 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these Lineage Piece monthly redeem codes to get your hands on plenty of free rewards, including Rerolls, coins and more.

Lineage Piece is a multi-anime crossover RPG on Roblox that is set in a world inspired by popular series like One Piece and Jujutsu Kaisen. The game centers around Devil Fruits, Fighting Styles, and Haki abilities that players unlock as they progress through various islands. Unlike typical bandit-beater games, Lineage Piece combines refined combat mechanics with character progression that reaches level 5000.

The game’s progression system revolves around exploring diverse islands, from Jujutsu High School to Frostborn Island, where players complete quests, defeat bandits, and battle bosses to earn currency and rare drops. Devil Fruits range from common fruits like Bomb (61% drop rate) to extremely rare ones like Light (only 2%), while Fighting Styles such as Gojo Style and Sukuna Style require specific boss drops and significant amounts of coins and gems to unlock. Players can reroll for Devil Fruits at Lineage Town using Coins or Gems, allowing them to chase their preferred abilities.

Launched in late 2025, the game has quickly become one of the most trending anime RPGs on Roblox in 2026. With over 1.8 million visits and a growing community, the game has gained a dedicated player base drawn to its rewarding grind and anime-authentic mechanics.

Active Lineage Piece Codes

  • GilgameshUPD – rewards (requires level 2500)
  • Almost2MVisits – rewards (requires level 1500)
  • 25KLIKES – rewards (requires level 1000)

Expired Lineage Piece Codes

As of the writing of this article, there are no expired Lineage Piece codes.

How To Redeem Lineage Piece Codes

While claiming codes in Lineage Piece is simple, gamers need to take one extra step. Here’s how:

  1. Launch Lineage Piece on Roblox
  2. Close the game and then like the game via the game page
  3. Join the game group (by clicking on the studio name on the page)
  4. Launch Lineage Piece again
  5. Find the settings icon and click on it
  6. Scroll until you find the text box
  7. Type or enter a working code into the box
  8. Click on enter to claim the freebie!

Where To Get More Lineage Piece Codes

Lineage Piece codes are typically released through the game’s community and developer channels, but they don’t appear automatically in-game. The best places to catch them early are the official Lineage Piece Discord server. That’s where new codes are posted to the ‘announcements’ channel as updates drop. The official Roblox group called Priz’s Den is also another source for codes.

Gamers can also find a list of working codes on the Lineage Piece Trello which has a dedicated link available in a Discord channel. Codes often come out around game milestones, major updates, and bug fixes. But if you’re only checking sporadically, you’ll very easily miss them because no alert system tells players when a code drops—or when it stops working. Because of this, the easiest strategy is to save this guide in your browser and check back instead of trying to monitor every source yourself.

This page is refreshed as soon as fresh codes go live, and any codes that have expired are taken out quickly so you always see only the ones that still work.

Having fun using codes in Roblox games? Then check out the latest codes for King Legacy, Hypershot, and MonsterVerze. Also, check out the Insider Gaming Discord server.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Broken Blade Codes (June 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these Roblox Broken Blade monthly redeem codes to get your hands on plenty of free rewards, including Beherit and much more.

Broken Blade is a fast-paced Action RPG on Roblox developed by Skyrift Devs. The game is set in a crumbling Norse-inspired realm where the World Tree has shattered. Gamers play as a lone warrior fighting to reclaim devastated lands by cutting down monster hordes and forging powerful weapons. The core gameplay loop involves exploring Nordic-themed islands, battling enemies and bosses, gathering loot and materials, then crafting custom weapons. 

Players can stack Races, Elements, and Blessings inspired by Norse mythology to create devastating builds. With a level cap of 15,000 and the recent Eclipse update adding Dragon Slayer reforging, there’s plenty of endgame content to tackle. The game progresses by tackling increasingly difficult quests and combat encounters, which drop currency and materials for purchasing new weapons and upgrades. 

A relatively new Roblox game, Broken Blade, has already racked up over 9 million visits and more than 30k favorites. Grinding battles provides steady progression, but redeem codes offer instant rewards like coins, XP boosts, spins, and exclusive items.

Active Broken Blade Codes

  • BB5KLIKES – eight Beherit
  • BBDC5K – three Holy and 5k claims
  • BB1KLIKES – ten thunder

Expired Broken Blade Codes

Fortunately as of June 2026, there are no expired Broken Blade Codes.

How To Redeem Broken Blade Codes

Like most Roblox games, redeem codes in Broken Blade is rather simple and easy. Here’s how:

  1. Boot Broken Blade on Roblox
  2. Find the setting menu on the top left of your screen and click on it
  3. Scroll all the way to the bottom
  4. Paste or type in the code in the given text box
  5. Click on redeem and claim your freebie!

Where To Redeem Broken Blade Codes

Broken Blade codes are usually shared through the game’s official community and developer channels rather than appearing directly in-game. The quickest way to find them is through the official Broken Blade Discord server, where the development team actively shares announcements and engages with the community, along with the game’s Roblox page, where developers highlight milestones and upcoming changes.

Most codes are released around key milestones, with new ones often tied to player count achievements, like goals, as well as major game updates and occasional holiday events. Because there’s no built-in notification system, it’s easy to miss out on active codes if players aren’t checking consistently. A more reliable approach is to bookmark this page and revisit it frequently.

That’s because this page is updated as soon as new codes are available, and expired ones are removed quickly, ensuring that only working codes are listed at any given time.

Having fun using codes in Roblox games? Then check out the latest codes for King Legacy, Hypershot, and MonsterVerze. Also, check out the Insider Gaming Discord server.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Anime Astral Simulator Codes (June 2026)
item.content:encoded:
Use these Roblox Anime Astral Simulator monthly redeem codes to get your hands on plenty of free rewards, including Potions, and much more.

Anime Astral Simulator is a popular Roblox game that drops players into the middle of a fast-paced anime-inspired world filled with powerful abilities to unlock and astral energy to collect. Players are required to train their characters and harness mystical powers upon launch, and from there, progress through the game to get the best abilities and transformations available. With upgrade systems, special astral techniques, and challenging milestones on offer, the Roblox game is rather exciting.

Players progress by tackling increasingly difficult training regimens and combat encounters, which reward experience points and currency for purchasing new abilities. The game features various power types with different effects and special transformations, letting players customize their character build to their preferences. Players can earn in-game currency by completing quests, defeating enemies, and participating in special events that offer exclusive rewards.

Released in 2026, Anime Astral Simulator has gradually gained traction and now boasts a fairly dedicated player base within the anime simulator community on Roblox.

Active Anime Astral Simulator Codes

  • 6KPLAYERS: 150 F2P Tickets + 5 Potions NEW
  • 200KVISITS: 150 F2P Tickets + 5 Potions
  • 100KVISITS: 150 F2P Tickets + 5 Potions
  • 1KLIKES: 150 F2P Tickets + 5 Potions
  • 5KPLAYERS: 150 F2P Tickets + 5 Potions
  • SORRYFORSHUTDOWN: 100 F2P Tickets + 8 Potions
  • 4KPLAYERS: 150 F2P Tickets
  • 3.5KPLAYERS: 150 F2P Tickets
  • 2.5KPLAYERS: 150 F2P Tickets
  • 1KPLAYERS: 150 F2P Tickets
  • RELEASE: 250 F2P Tickets + 14 Potions

Expired Anime Astral Simulator Codes

As of the writing of this article, there are no expired Anime Astral Simulator Codes.

How To Redeem Anime Astral Simulator Codes

Redeem Anime Astral Simulator Codes are super easy especially for those used to Roblox games and used to redeeming codes in the platform. Here’s how:

  1. Launch Anime Astral Simulator in Roblox
  2. Click on the flower-shaped icon with a tick-mark on the top right corner
  3. Type or paste the code in the box
  4. Click on “Redeem code” to collect the freebie.

Where To Get More Anime Astral Simulator Codes

Anime Astral Simulator codes are usually shared through the game’s official community and developer channels rather than appearing directly in-game. The quickest way to find them is through the official Anime Astral Simulator discord channel and community groups, where developers regularly announce new codes and game updates, along with the game’s Roblox page, where the development team highlights milestones and upcoming changes.

Most codes are released around key milestones, with new ones often tied to player count achievements, like goals, as well as major game updates and occasional holiday events. Because there’s no built-in notification system, it’s easy to miss out on active codes if players aren’t checking consistently. A more reliable approach is to bookmark this page and revisit it frequently.

That’s because this page is updated as soon as new codes are available, and expired ones are removed quickly, ensuring that only working codes are listed at any given time.

Having fun using codes in Roblox games? Then check out the latest codes for 99 Nights in the Forest, Type Soul, and Azure Latch. Also, check out the Insider Gaming Discord server.

item.title: Madden NFL 27 Performance Mode Delivers 100+ FPS on PS5 Pro
item.content:encoded:
Madden NFL 27 introduces new graphics settings on the Sony PlayStation 5 Pro and Nintendo Switch 2, offering visual and performance-focused modes. Specifically, there are two new modes: Visual Pro and Performance Pro.

According to the official Madden NFL 27 blog from EA, PS5 Pro players will be able to get 100 FPS while playing the game. Additionally, these modes are available on the Nintendo Switch 2. While not as powerful as the PS5 Pro, Switch 2 players will be able to reach up to 60 frames per second in Performance Pro mode. Players can adjust their graphics settings in the options menu.

More On Madden NFL 27’s Visual Changes

This year’s game is all about increasing the authenticity on the Gridiron. Not only does the development team accomplish this with the enhanced graphic choices, but also with new features such as the dynamic weather elements. Like in real life, weather is unpredictable, and in this year’s game, no two games play the same, and no quarters play the same. Weather can evolve between quarters, and that will change the look and challenge in any given game. Snow and rain are dynamic. Specifically, the rain conditions can shift from heavy to light or vice versa. These effects don’t just change the game; they change the look of the players in the uniforms.

“For the first time, snow can appear on uniforms. Sweat areas now get darker with saturation, and you will see more dirt, more grime, and more wear show up across the player. The game should tell the story of what has happened on the field. If you have been battling through a wet, muddy, snowy, physical game, your players should look like it,” the blog notes.

This year’s Madden will release on August 13 and features Caleb Williams on the cover. This is the first time a Chicago Bears player is on the cover of a Madden game.

How do you feel about these visual changes coming to the Madden franchise? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Steam Machine and Steam Frame Set to Ship in Summer 2026
item.content:encoded:
Valve has provided a new update on the Steam Machine and Steam Frame and their impending release.

When they were first announced in 2025, the Steam Machine and Steam Frame were slated for release in the first half of 2026. However, in a February blog post, they noted that they needed to reassess pricing matters and still hoped to ship the hardware in the first half of the year. Now, there’s a new update that still promises a 2026 release.

Valve Details Steam Machine Compatibility Before Release

In a June 4 blog post, Valve noted that both the Steam Machine and Steam Frame are slated for shipment this summer. Furthermore, both will have Standalone verified programs similar to the Steam Deck verified initiative. For those who already run games on the Steam Deck, any games that run on that hardware should work without issue on the forthcoming PC-console hybrid.

“The requirements for Steam Machine Verified are nearly identical to Steam Deck Verified, and focus on the customer experience out of the box: Does the default controller configuration work well? Do the default graphic settings perform well? Tens of thousands of Steam titles have gone through the Steam Deck Verified program, so for both developers and customers, the Steam Machine Verified program will feel very familiar,” notes.

As for the Steam Frame VR headset, that is designed for high-quality game streaming from a PC. It’s also a PC in its own right, and games can be run entirely on the headset.

“Like Steam Deck Verified, the Steam Frame Standalone Verified program focuses on the experience customers will have with the device out-of-the-box in standalone mode,” says Valve.

There’s still no price for either device. Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates as more information becomes available.

How much do you think these devices will cost? Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/steam-machine-and-steam-frame-set-to-ship-in-summer-2026/

item.title: NYT Strands #823 Hints and Answers for Today, June 4, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Strands is a daily word search puzzle game from The New York Times. It is a relatively new game, launched in 2024, in which players seek a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid.

Whether it’s your first time playing or you’re a Strands veteran, today’s tips and strategies can help you find words faster. So, if you’ve found yourself stuck with today’s Strands, don’t worry; below you’ll find some helpful hints and even the answers for Strands Game #823 for Thursday, June 4, 2026

To play today’s Strands, head to the game’s website.

IMPORTANT: The following information includes spoilers on today’s edition of Strands. If you don’t want the answer given to you, stop scrolling.

How To Play Strands

Strands is a daily word search that challenges you to find words with a common theme. There’s also a Spanagram that reveals the deeper theme behind the words.

  • Words that are three letters or fewer do not count.
  • Words that reveal the correct theme appear in blue.
  • The Spanagram turns yellow when found.
  • Finding three words that don’t fit the theme will reveal a hint to help you find the proper words.

The goal is to string together as many words as possible. Every letter on the grid gets used! Daily puzzles keep players coming back for more, making it a fun brain exercise and a popular online trend.

Strands can only be played on the New York Times website or on the NYT Games app.

Strands Hints for Today, June 4, 2026

The Strands’ answers to the theme of Game #823 are all terms related to someone who can keep cool and look good on the dance floor

General Strands Hints for June 4

Without giving today’s Strands answers completely away, here are a few helpful hints for today to get you started:

  • Hint 1: Will & __.
  • Hint 2: Having a good fashion sense.
  • Hint 3: Chunky Kong can pick up a boulder with relative ___.

Use these clues to narrow down your searches and increase your chances of solving Strands #823 for June 4, 2026.

Words to Help You Find Strand Hints for June 4, 2026

If you want help getting started without having today’s Strands answer given to you, there are a few starter words worth trying that will help you unlock some in-game hints. A few starter words that may help are:

  • ROMS
  • PROMS
  • PROM
  • ROPE
  • BASE

Today’s Strands Answer for Game #822 on June 3, 2026

If you’ve tried everything, including using the above hints, and are still stuck, you can find the answers to today’s Strands below. Check out the answers for past puzzles here.

  • COMPOSURE
  • APLOMB
  • STYLE
  • GRACE
  • POISE
  • EASE
  • SPANAGRAM: POETRYINMOTION

If you solved today’s Strands without our answers, congratulations! If not, take note of the best tips above for tomorrow’s puzzle, and check back daily for more hints.

When Is The Next Strands Game After #823?

All New York Times games are updated daily at 12 am or Midnight in your respective time zone. Information about the next game is often available in the hours leading up to it, giving players a heads-up. The game on June 5 will be Strands Game #824.

What Is Strands?

Strands is a daily word search puzzle game created by The New York Times. Launched in 2024, Strands challenges players to discover a common theme among words in a 6×8 letter grid. The game’s original concept was developed by Juliette Seive, a research director on The New York Times Games team, with the aim of replicating Wordle’s success. Tracy Bennett has served as the puzzle editor for Strands, overseeing the creation and curation of daily puzzles since the publication’s launch.

For even more Insider Gaming delivered straight to your inbox, sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android



https://insider-gaming.com/nyt-strands-823-hints-and-answers-for-today-june-4-2026/

item.title: Hades 2 Hotfix Addresses Many Issues and Mystery Seed Locations
item.content:encoded:
The latest hotfix for Hades 2 addresses numerous issues and enhances quality of life in the game. Released on June 3, this second post-launch patch includes fixes for visual and collision problems, as well as some rare crashes.

One notable addition is an inventory hint that indicates where players can find Mystery Seeds. Tons of interactions between the gods have been fixed as well.

More on Hades 2 Patch

Even though this is just a hot fix and not a major update, major elements of the game are still adjusted. This includes boss battles. These fixes include fixing an issue where “the barrier from Snow Queen (Demeter) could vanish unexpectedly at a certain point in the fight against Unrivaled Typhon.

Other Typhon-related fixes have been added, such as Chronos no longer being able to attack him more frequently than expected.

Hades 2 General Reception

Hades 2 was released in September 2025. It currently sits at a 95 Metascore on Metacritic, with several outlets giving it a perfect score, especially for the Nintendo Switch 2 edition.

On Steam, the game currently has an overwhelmingly positive review score with over 63,000 reviews in English. The game also won the Steam Award for the best game on Steam Deck in 2025.

Those interested can check out the full patch notes for the recent hotfix at this link. For more on Insider Gaming, check out everything that was announced during our recent showcase.

Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

item.title: Nintendo Switch 2 Sales Fall Sharply in Japan Following Price Hike
item.content:encoded:
In the week following the Nintendo Switch 2’s price hike in Japan, the console sold fewer than 40,000 units in the region.

Western countries have until September 1 to get their hands on a Nintendo Switch 2 before the price increases. However, in Japan, the price increase took effect on May 25, raising the price from nearly ¥50,000 to approximately ¥60,000. Almost immediately, console sales were affected.

Famitsu’s hardware sales charts for Japan reported that the system sold only 31,751 units in the week of May 25 to May 31. This was a decrease from the previously reported 247,880 units sold the week prior. The original Nintendo Switch also saw a big decrease. Last week, the OG Switch sold only 229 units. The week prior, the console had moved 2,731 units.

What’s Next for Nintendo Switch 2?

The Nintendo Switch 2 was released a year ago this week. With a rumored Nintendo Direct presentation next week, many are hoping that the gaming juggernaut will begin announcing some of the tentpole releases that will anchor this gaming generation not only next year but also for the rest of the life cycle.

It is rumored that a remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time will be released this year, potentially as the major holiday game. However, as everyone continues to wait for the announcement of the next 3D Mario, nearly 10 years since the launch of Super Mario Odyssey, that game is not expected until at least 2027. Learn more here.

Learn more about the potential Nintendo Direct coming next week here. Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates on the official announcement of the Direct.

Sound off about this story and all others in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android
